diagrams.title: Adjacency Matrix Example
diagrams.description: Shows a 4-vertex undirected graph and its adjacency matrix representation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding matrix representation showing edge-vertex relationships

diagrams.title: Adjacency List Example
diagrams.description: Shows the same 4-vertex graph using adjacency list with linked lists
diagrams.purpose: Understanding list representation and pointer-based storage

diagrams.title: BFS vs DFS Traversal Order
diagrams.description: Demonstrates different traversal orders on the same sample graph
elements: BFS: visits in concentric circles by distance
DFS: follows one branch deeply before backtracking
diagrams.purpose: Comparing exploration strategies and output order

diagrams.title: Graph with Cycle and Visited Tracking
diagrams.description: Shows a graph containing a cycle and demonstrates how visited array prevents infinite loops
elements: Vertices A,B,C,D forming a cycle A->B->C->A
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why visited array is critical for cycle handling
